## Commit Summary: `audits-reviews-fix-all-and-remediate`

**No new milestones or features needed.** This ponder was already crystallized during the session itself. The work maps directly to the existing milestone:

### Milestone: `finding-closure-protocol` — Finding-Closure Protocol

| Feature | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `audit-review-guidance-section` | **released** | Added §12 Audit & Review Findings to `.sdlc/guidance.md` |
| `audit-review-approval-protocol` | **draft** | `sdlc-next` template split + CLAUDE.md ethos bullet |

The ponder's three deliverables:
1. `sdlc-next.rs` template — split approval into two tracks (spec/design/tasks vs review/audit), adding the find/fix/track/accept protocol
2. `CLAUDE.md` ethos bullet — "Audits and reviews close every finding"
3. `.sdlc/guidance.md` §12 — 3-row finding classification table

The guidance section is already released. The approval protocol feature (`audit-review-approval-protocol`) is in draft and needs its spec written.

**Next:** `/sdlc-next audit-review-approval-protocol`
